executionArgs.additionalInstruction: CRITICAL AUTHENTICATION: Always use {"Identifier": "admin@sessionflow.local", "Password": "Admin1234!"} for login. The field is "Identifier" NOT "email". CRITICAL GROUP CREATION: POST /api/groups requires: Level (1-4), Frequency (1-3), NumberOfStudents MUST be 4 or less for Levels 1-3 and 2 or less for Level 4. Schedules array length MUST equal Frequency. Each schedule: {"DayOfWeek": int 0-6, "StartTime": "HH:mm:ss", "DurationMinutes": int}. CRITICAL REGISTRATION: POST /api/auth/register returns status "Pending" — do NOT attempt login with newly registered credentials. CRITICAL SESSION LIFECYCLE: Sessions start in "Scheduled" state. You MUST call POST /api/sessions/{id}/start BEFORE updating attendance. CRITICAL GROUP UPDATE: PUT /api/groups/{id} now returns full object with id, name, description, level, frequency, numberOfStudents.
